commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: move-anything-waveform-editor
repository.description: Waveform Editor tool for Move Everything - trim, gain adjust, normalize, and edit WAV files on the Ableton Move

commit.message:
Fix recording race condition and improve recorded file handling

- Add "stopping" state to poll sampler finalization before loading WAV,
  preventing "No waveform data" error from async stop
- Show "SAVING..." screen while waiting for WAV to finalize
- Track recorded files as unsaved (dirty) with discard-on-exit cleanup
- Add timestamp to edit filenames (sample_edit_0306_1423.wav)
- Clean up recording UI header (remove debug VU display)
- Add dirty param support to DSP plugin

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Remap knobs: E4=vertical scale, E5=gain/threshold, E7/E8=twist actions

- E3: zoom only (removed shift+E3 vertical scale)
- E4: vertical scale for all modes (was shift+E3)
- E5: gain/normalize in trim/loop, threshold in slice auto (was E4)
- E7 touch+twist: toggle loop on/off
- E8 touch+twist: snap to zero crossing
- Twist prompts stay visible while knob is touched
- Add snapToZeroCrossing() helper function
- Recording waveform: scrolling write-head visualization
- Recording stop: poll for sampler finalization before loading
- Shift+pad preview: 5% of selection, clamped 0.25s-5s
- Update help.json for new knob layout

repository.name: dre-raiz
repository.description: Dre financeira da raiz educação

commit.message:
Replace GameInstanceIterator with GameInstances eager collection (#275)

* feat: introduce GameInstances collection and to_rows() transformation

Adds GameInstances as a flat, eagerly-loaded collection of row dicts
(experiment + game_instance) backed by to_rows() which flattens the
hierarchical instances.json structure. Provides filter() aligned with
HF Dataset API for future compatibility, find_by_game_id() for direct
lookup, and factory classmethods from_game_spec/from_file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: replace GameInstanceIterator with GameInstances

Replace the lazy, queue-based GameInstanceIterator with the eager
GameInstances collection across all call sites. Runners now iterate
over row dicts with "experiment" and "game_instance" keys. The
GameInstanceIteratorWrapper in the pettingzoo env is updated to accept
GameInstances directly, using iter() or cycle() instead of reset().
Filtering is now done via GameInstances.filter() with a plain callable,
simplifying the sub_selector pattern in cli.py and master.py.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: align to_instance_filter with GameInstances.filter() API

Convert to_instance_filter to return a Callable[[dict], bool] matching
the GameInstances.filter() signature, using a whitelist set for O(1)
lookup. Update the return type annotation and docstring accordingly.
Update tests to pass row dicts instead of (game, experiment) string pairs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: add game_name to to_rows for cross-game filtering support

to_rows now takes game_name as first argument and includes it in every
row dict, making the row structure self-contained. This enables
to_instance_filter to work across multiple GameInstances collections
using a single dataset covering multiple games. Update docs and tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: align openenv environment and runner docstrings with renamed params

Fix gym_env() call in openenv server using stale game_instance_filter
kwarg (now instances_filter). Update stale game_instance_iterator
docstring references in dispatch and batchwise runners.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor(mirror): remove MOCK_PROFILE fallback (#190)

* refactor(mirror): remove MOCK_PROFILE fallback in favor of Convex data

Profiles are now fully sourced from Convex, making the hardcoded
rick-rubin mock unnecessary. Simplifies profile layout to notFound()
directly when no Convex profile exists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(mirror): move conversation list into sheet + @content parallel slot

Replace the full-page conversation list with a slide-out sheet triggered
from the chat header. Content (article list/detail) now renders via an
@content parallel slot so it stays mounted during chat navigation.

Key changes:
- Add @content parallel slot with default, page, and [slug] routes
- Add ChatConversationListSheet component for slide-out conversation list
- Remove ConversationListWorkspace (no longer needed)
- Thread conversations list through ChatContext/ChatProvider
- Add conversation list button to ChatHeader
- Fix contentMode derivation using useSelectedLayoutSegment("content")
- Fix sheet width breakpoint to align with useIsMobile (md: not sm:)
- Fix lint: unused children in layout, unused conversationId in ChatThread

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor chat header to be three columns

* refine wireframe sphere style

* feat(mirror): refine chat conversation list sheet and header UX

Restyle conversation list sheet as a floating card anchored below
the header with transparent overlay, superellipse corners, and
muted styling. Simplify chat header to single conversation-list
toggle, bump icon size, and drop the back-arrow link. Add
overlayClassName prop to shared Sheet primitive so consumers can
control the overlay background. Minor tweaks to chat input font
size, conversation list active/hover states, and wireframe sphere
opacity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(mirror): polish chat UI details and remove unused chat-input

- Reduce conversation list empty state bottom padding
- Soften wireframe sphere ring opacity and add subtle fill
- Tighten chat message avatar gap
- Speed up sheet close animation to match open duration
- Remove unused ChatInput component from profile feature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refine editable name

* adjust the font size of the editable name

* feat(mirror): move chat state to query params for panel independence

Chat state now lives in ?chat=1&conversation=<id> search params instead
of path segments, so navigating content (articles) no longer destroys
the active chat panel. Legacy /chat URLs redirect to the new format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(mirror): chat header profile click closes chat instead of navigating away

Replace the hardcoded `/@username` Link in chat header with a closeChat
callback that strips chat/conversation query params while preserving the
current content path. This prevents article detail pages from resetting
when clicking the profile avatar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style(mirror): add cursor-pointer to chat header profile button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(mirror): prevent interaction panel remount during article navigation

Remove redundant @interaction/page.tsx and @interaction/[slug]/page.tsx
parallel route files that caused Next.js to unmount/remount the entire
interaction slot tree when navigating between article list and detail.
Keeping only default.tsx preserves the slot's active state during soft
navigation, eliminating the scroll position jump when chat is open.

Also adds scroll={false} to article navigation links and simplifies
routeMode derivation in WorkspaceShell.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* move animated geometries

* fix(mirror): fix typo in chat-input className and add interaction slot comment

Fix broken CSS class (space in selector) and change focus bg to bg-hover.
Add explanatory comment in @interaction/default.tsx about why page.tsx must not exist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(renderer): 포인트 언어를 사과 메타포로 통일

"원/잔고" 표현을 "사과 N개"로 변경해 게임 오브젝트와

fix: use fresh DOM container per Turnstile token for reliable multi-message chat

Previous approaches (reset, execute, re-render) all failed for subsequent
messages. Fresh container per token request always works because Turnstile
reliably renders into a clean DOM element on first render.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix HA ingress: use relative paths for all resources and API calls

Under HA ingress the base URL is /api/hassio_ingress/<token>/,
so absolute paths like /style.css or /api/budget/computed fail.
Changed all paths to relative (no leading slash). Bump v1.0.7.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(orchestrator): don't block queue on missing feature intent

When LLM intent derivation fails or returns empty, the queue item stayed
pending and was retried every check-in forever. Now proceeds without
intent since it's useful metadata but not required to run a pipeline.

using pbcopy when the user needs to paste content elsewhere.

commit.message:
feat: add list/delete/archive, projects, and ask --continue/--project (#28)

* feat: add list/delete/archive, projects, and ask --continue/--project

Phase 3 implementation covering three issues:

- #17: Add `list`, `delete`, and `archive` commands for conversation
  management via the sidebar context menu
- #18: Add `projects` command to list projects and project chats,
  plus `ask --project` to send prompts within a project context
- #19: Add `ask --continue` and `ask --continue --chat <id>` to
  continue existing conversations

Also introduces shared utilities: `withDriver()` lifecycle helper,
`fail()`/`errorMessage()`/`validateFormat()` in output-handler,
and `conversationLinkById()` with CSS injection prevention.

Closes #17, closes #18, closes #19

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address CodeRabbit review feedback

- Add explicit navigateToNewChat() in default ask path to prevent
  accidentally continuing an existing chat
- Add English locale fallback for archive selector
- Add timestamp field to ConversationItem (extracted from DOM if available)
- Fix error message in conversationLinkById to match actual validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: validate chatId before navigation, use pathname for chat check

- Add chatId format validation in navigateToChat() to fail fast on
  invalid input before attempting navigation
- Replace fragile url.includes('/c/') with URL.pathname.startsWith('/c/')

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: warn on sidebar timeout in getProjectConversationList

Increase timeout to 10s and emit a warning instead of silently
returning an empty list, so users can distinguish between an
actually empty project and a slow sidebar render.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: filter projects by --name when --chats is not specified

Previously --name without --chats was ignored and all projects were
listed. Now the project list is filtered by partial case-insensitive
name match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: wait for sidebar before querying projects/chats, throw on timeout

- Add waitForSidebarLinks() helper that throws on timeout instead of
  returning empty results, so automation gets actionable errors
- getProjectList() now waits for sidebar + accepts quiet parameter
  for API consistency with other driver methods
- getProjectConversationList() now throws on sidebar timeout instead
  of silently returning []
- navigateToProject() benefits from getProjectList()'s sidebar wait

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: wait for sidebar container before reading conversations, validate project href

- getConversationList() now waits for #history container before reading
  links, so empty results reflect a genuinely empty sidebar
- Add SIDEBAR_HISTORY selector for the sidebar container
- getProjectList() now validates href pattern (/g/{id}/project) and
  skips entries with unexpected format instead of using empty id

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: throw on sidebar container timeout, allow zero-item lists

- waitForSidebarContainer now throws on timeout instead of silently
  returning, since a missing #history container indicates page load failure
- getProjectList and getProjectConversationList now use
  waitForSidebarContainer instead of waitForSidebarLinks, allowing
  zero projects/chats as a valid state
- Remove unused waitForSidebarLinks method

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove phantom timestamp field and document CDP tab limitation

- Remove ConversationItem.timestamp: live DOM inspection confirmed
  ChatGPT sidebar has no <time> elements, so the field was always empty
- Document CDP active-tab limitation in --continue code path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address review findings — fail-fast, validation, and sidebar wait

- Throw on unexpected project href format instead of silent skip
  (evaluateAll throw propagation verified via live Chrome test)
- Disallow --thinking-effort with --continue (model mismatch)
- Omit model metadata in JSON output for --continue flows
- Add sidebar wait to openConversationMenu to prevent false "not found"
- Remove duplicate sidebar wait in getProjectConversationList
- Extract navigate() to reduce cognitive complexity
- Add live_test_done step to workflow gate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: disable CodeRabbit auto-pause after reviewed commits

Set auto_pause_after_reviewed_commits to 0 so reviews run automatically
on every push without requiring manual @coderabbitai review triggers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: validate empty --chat/--project and strict conversation href parsing

- Reject empty --chat and --project with actionable error messages
- Parse conversation hrefs with regex /^\/c\/([^/?#]+)$/ instead of
  naive replace, fail-fast on unexpected formats
- Consistent with getProjectList strict href validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: strict conversation href parsing with regex validation

Parse conversation hrefs with /^\/c\/([^/?#]+)$/ instead of naive
replace('/c/', ''), fail-fast on unexpected formats. Verified against
live ChatGPT DOM.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: skip non-project links and reference locale issue

- Revert project href throw to skip: selector a[href*="/project"] is
  broad and may match settings/overview routes in the future
- Reference #29 for archive multi-locale tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: include selector context in conversation href error message

Pass SELECTORS.CONVERSATION_LINK as evaluateAll arg so the error
includes the selector for debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove waitForReady from withDriver, scope selectors to sidebar

- withDriver no longer calls waitForReady(); list/projects/delete/archive
  only need sidebar, not the composer prompt
- Scope CONVERSATION_LINK and conversationLinkById to #history to prevent
  matching /c/ links in chat message content

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Auto-compute score_scale_factor during calibration (closes #22)

After fitting isotonic calibration, compute the theoretical max weighted
score from calibrated dimension maxima and write score_scale_factor to
config.yaml. Uses regex insert/replace to preserve YAML comments.

Formula: 10.0 / sum(weight_i * calibrated_max_i)
Idempotent: updates existing value on re-runs.

commit.message:
feat: WidgeTDC Orchestrator v1.0.0

Multi-agent coordination layer bridging AI agents (Gemini, Claude, RLM)
to the Railway MCP backend without exposing secrets.

- POST /tools/call — Agent→Orchestrator→Railway MCP tool proxy with ACL
- POST /agents/register — Agent handshake with capability declaration
- WS /ws — Real-time AgentMessage broadcast channel
- POST /chat/message — REST chat broadcast
- GET /health — Railway health check
- GET / — Live HTML dashboard with auto-refresh

Pre-built with esbuild (contracts bundled in, no file: deps at runtime).

Add sleep(1ms) in serial read loop to reduce Windows sampling jitter

The busy-wait loop polling inWaiting() with no pause caused CPU
scheduling competition on Windows, leading to sampling time
oscillations. Adding sleep(0.001) between polls yields the CPU
quantum to the scheduler, reducing jitter. The sleep only executes
while waiting for data — once the sweep terminator arrives, the
loop exits immediately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
